title: Spicy Coal
description: Ever needed better coal? Here it is!
body:
Spicy Coal for 1.15.1 and higher requires CoalAPI! Download it here

 

 

This mod has received a complete overhaul, changes to the below are in bold.

This is a small mod that adds a new coal called "Spicy Coal". This coal is like standard coal, but more effective (crafts 12 torches, smelts 24 items) and it can be used to craft Blaze Rods. You can also make an ingot version which is used to craft Spicy Apples which restore 8 points of food (twice as much as an apple) and grant 30 seconds of Fire Resistance, a spicy helmet which grants fire resistance and 5 points of protection (people who used 1.4 remember this as the enhanced spicy helmet), spicy soup that restores 14 points of food, and a spicy sword that has low base damage but can grant the "Cursed Inferno" effect, which constantly sets you on fire and can be put out with water, but getting out of water will set you back on fire until the effect expires. Spicy Coal requires a diamond pickaxe to mine and spawns in the nether. (there's also a spicy coal block, it's just a building block and a better smelting option). There's also a few advancements to unlock.

 

1.12.2 Made with MCreator (mcreator.net).

 

You know how KrokoOnAir released a 1.14.4 port for Depressed Coal? Well, they ported Spicy Coal too! The best part? They're compatible with each other! Just like with Depressed Coal, not everything is the same in the 1.14.4 port. For one, the spicy helmet is part of a full armor set (and has been nerfed because of that), and the armor set bonus is fire resistance. Also, the sword deals 10 damage.

 

I have a discord for these mods now: Klick!

KrokoOnAir´s Discord: Klick!

 

FAQ:

 Q: Can you downgrade the mod to version X ?

  A: No im dont downgrade the mod to older versions

 Q: My Game Crash what can i do?

  A: Try to install the CoalAPI

 Q: I Found a bug how can i report it?

  A: go to the issues tab on the mod site and press on create issue
